title: SchemaHub
description: A lightweight Fabric mod for browsing, downloading, and uploading Minecraft schematics directly in-game.
body: # SchematicBrowser Browse, download, and share Minecraft schematics directly in-game! ## Features - **Browse & Download**: Explore a wide collection of schematics, filter by category, search by name, and download with one click. - **Upload Your Schematics**: Share your creations with the community by uploading `.schem`, `.litematic`, or `.nbt` files, with title, description, and tags. - **Clean Interface**: Intuitive layout, easy navigation, and always-accessible buttons. ## How to Use - Open **Schematic Browser** from the main menu - Filter or search for schematics - Click **Download** to save or **Upload** to share your own - Refresh to see the latest schematics ## Support & Future Updates Found a bug or have a suggestion? Feedback is welcome! Future updates may include **thumbnail previews** for schematics. Donations help support the server and keep the project running. ## Credits Thanks to all schematic creators and the Minecraft community for inspiration.
